validated_commands.lint_check: python3 -m ruff check src/ tests/ && python3 -m ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_fix: python3 -m ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && python3 -m ruff format src/ tests/

env_notes: Go 1.24.x env. Use 'go test ./...' for Go. Python src/ still present but Go is primary. PyPy 3.10 for Python tests.

Fix 7 failing tests: strip ANSI escape codes in _ascii_only before char check

infrastructure_notes: Go codebase migrated from Python. 350 Go test files. Total coverage ~49.9%. Go tests run with 'go test ./...'.
testing_notes: Pack tests: existing tests only tested struct fields (0% code coverage). Functional tests with t.TempDir() work well. Cover Run(), RunUnpack(), helpers.
migration_note: PR #56 merged 2026-05-19: full python-to-go-migration. Primary language is now Go.
